assetWorkflow.policy: Original source assets are preserved. Production preview references optimized derivatives.

pendingConfirmations.label: Pickup details
pendingConfirmations.buildFallback: Pickup address, hours, cutoff policy, and response time are pending Hatfield McCoy confirmation.
pendingConfirmations.launchRequirement: Confirm pickup address, hours, order cutoff policy, and expected response time.

pendingConfirmations.label: DTF pressing instructions
pendingConfirmations.buildFallback: Final time, temperature, pressure, peel, and wash guidance is pending Hatfield McCoy confirmation.
pendingConfirmations.launchRequirement: Confirm final time, temperature, pressure, peel, and wash instructions for published guide copy.

pendingConfirmations.label: Wholesale minimum order threshold
pendingConfirmations.buildFallback: Minimum order threshold is pending Hatfield McCoy confirmation.
pendingConfirmations.launchRequirement: Confirm minimum order threshold or remove the threshold claim entirely.

pendingConfirmations.label: Wholesale turnaround and cutoff policy
pendingConfirmations.buildFallback: Turnaround and cutoff policy are pending operational review.
pendingConfirmations.launchRequirement: Confirm wholesale turnaround language and cutoff policy before publishing.

pendingConfirmations.label: Artwork upload endpoint
pendingConfirmations.buildFallback: Direct ordering can stay in preview until the production artwork upload destination is verified.
pendingConfirmations.launchRequirement: Connect the direct-order artwork upload endpoint and confirm files are attached to order metadata.

pendingConfirmations.label: Shopify publish approval
pendingConfirmations.buildFallback: Products remain draft or launch-held until publication, media, and checkout verification are complete.
pendingConfirmations.launchRequirement: Approve fulfillment, pricing, copy, images, SEO, and checkout for every published product.

launchBlockers: Client confirmation required for operational public claims; build may proceed with fallback copy.
Shopify products must remain draft until copy, fulfillment, pricing, imagery, SEO, and checkout approvals pass.
robots.txt is intentionally Disallow: / for preview; launch requires approval-gated sitemap and robots update.
Artwork upload and Shopify publication must be verified before public launch.
